articles.title: Government promises to act after 'shocking' failings in maternity care in England
articles.description: An independent inquiry has found "unacceptable racism and discrimination" is affecting patient safety.

articles.title: Refugees would be told to repay around £10,000 under new asylum bill
articles.description: The Home Office will be given powers to recover costs from adults who have received asylum support under new laws.

articles.title: Manhunt under way after bomb injures Ukrainian oligarch and others in Monaco
articles.description: The blast was caused by an explosive device which appeared to contain bolts and pellets, the head of Monaco's government said.

articles.title: Government 'cannot deport' grooming gang ringleader
articles.description: A 55-year-old law means the government has no legal powers to remove Shabir Ahmed from the UK.
